title: A Mobile Auxiliary Diagnosis System for Melanoma Based on Multi-Modal Fusion

Mid-term Project Presentation
Pengcheng Sun | Supervisor: Omid Pournik

textPreview: Mid-term Project Presentation | Pengcheng Sun | Supervisor: Omid Pournik | 2025-2026

name: summary-thesis
text: Clinical metadata improves the image-only baseline, and the resulting model is integrated into a working mobile screening workflow.
textPreview: Clinical metadata improves the image-only baseline, and the resulting model is integrated into a working mobile screening workflow.

name: copy-Completed
text: Dataset pipeline, baseline, fusion model and formal validation outputs.
textPreview: Dataset pipeline, baseline, fusion model and formal validation outputs.

name: copy-Integrated

textPreview: Authenticated FastAPI inference, Flutter result display and SQLite history.

textPreview: Source: formal baseline and multi-modal metrics_summary.csv files; current project implementation.

name: aim-copy
text:
Project aim
- Build an AI-assisted mobile melanoma screening workflow.
- Compare image-only ResNet50 with a multi-modal model using image plus age, sex and anatomical site.
- Deploy the trained model through a FastAPI backend and Flutter app.
textPreview: Project aim | - Build an AI-assisted mobile melanoma screening workflow. | - Compare image-only ResNet50 with a multi-modal model using i...

name: copy-Problem
text: Melanoma is rare in the dataset but clinically high impact. This makes accuracy alone unsafe as a headline metric.
textPreview: Melanoma is rare in the dataset but clinically high impact. This makes accuracy alone unsafe as a headline metric.

name: copy-Engineering need
text: A model result must be connected to usable software: image input, clinical metadata, authenticated API calls and saved history.
textPreview: A model result must be connected to usable software: image input, clinical metadata, authenticated API calls and saved history.

name: copy-Intended outcome
text: A traceable prototype that supports screening discussion, not an autonomous medical diagnosis.
textPreview: A traceable prototype that supports screening discussion, not an autonomous medical diagnosis.

name: source-note
text: Sources: Project log-book; ISIC2020 prepared dataset summary.
textPreview: Sources: Project log-book; ISIC2020 prepared dataset summary.

title: Previous work informs the design choice

name: slide-title
text: Previous work informs the design choice
textPreview: Previous work informs the design choice

name: copy-Skin lesion CNNs
text: Prior work shows CNNs can classify skin lesions from images, but clinical deployment requires careful framing and validation.
textPreview: Prior work shows CNNs can classify skin lesions from images, but clinical deployment requires careful framing and validation.

name: copy-ResNet50 baseline
text: Residual learning provides a stable pretrained image backbone. It is used here as the image-only comparator.
textPreview: Residual learning provides a stable pretrained image backbone. It is used here as the image-only comparator.

name: copy-ISIC2020 dataset
text: ISIC2020 provides dermoscopic images with metadata fields that match the multi-modal research question.
textPreview: ISIC2020 provides dermoscopic images with metadata fields that match the multi-modal research question.

name: rationale
text:
Design implication
- Use image-only ResNet50 first, then add a compact clinical MLP branch.
- Compare both models on the same validation split.
- Report AUC, average precision, recall, F1 and balanced accuracy because class imbalance is severe.
textPreview: Design implication | - Use image-only ResNet50 first, then add a compact clinical MLP branch. | - Compare both models on the same validat...

name: source-note
text: References: He et al. 2016; Esteva et al. 2017; ISIC Challenge Datasets; SIIM-ISIC 2020 challenge article.
textPreview: References: He et al. 2016; Esteva et al. 2017; ISIC Challenge Datasets; SIIM-ISIC 2020 challenge article.

name: copy-Legal and societal position
text: The application prototype stores local demo account/history data and must not be presented as replacing professional medical diagnosis.
textPreview: The application prototype stores local demo account/history data and must not be presented as replacing professional medical diagnosis.

name: copy-Engineering success condition
text: The model, backend and mobile app must agree on preprocessing, metadata encoding and prediction semantics.
textPreview: The model, backend and mobile app must agree on preprocessing, metadata encoding and prediction semantics.

name: flow-branch-note
text: FastAPI returns the JSON result to the current screen and, in parallel, stores the authenticated prediction so it can be retrieved later.
textPreview: FastAPI returns the JSON result to the current screen and, in parallel, stores the authenticated prediction so it can be retrieved later.

name: source-note
text: Sources: backend/app.py; backend/auth.py; lib/backend_api.dart; lib/detection.dart; lib/history.dart.
textPreview: Sources: backend/app.py; backend/auth.py; lib/backend_api.dart; lib/detection.dart; lib/history.dart.

name: process-copy-PyTorch dataset
text:
RGB image tensor +
12-D clinical vector + label
textPreview: RGB image tensor + | 12-D clinical vector + label

name: copy-Clinical encoding
text: Age is divided by 100. Sex uses 4 one-hot categories and anatomical site uses 7 one-hot categories, giving a 12-dimensional vector. Missing values map to 'unknown'.
textPreview: Age is divided by 100. Sex uses 4 one-hot categories and anatomical site uses 7 one-hot categories, giving a 12-dimensional vector. Missi...

name: train-transform-line
text: Training transforms: random resized crop to 224, horizontal flip, rotation, colour jitter and ImageNet normalization.
textPreview: Training transforms: random resized crop to 224, horizontal flip, rotation, colour jitter and ImageNet normalization.

name: val-transform-line
text: Validation transforms: resize to 256, center crop to 224 and ImageNet normalization; no random augmentation.
textPreview: Validation transforms: resize to 256, center crop to 224 and ImageNet normalization; no random augmentation.

preview: Subset | Total | Benign | Malignant | Loader behavior

name: copy-Fair comparison
text: Same validation split. Select by AUC; also report recall, F1 and balanced accuracy.
textPreview: Same validation split. Select by AUC; also report recall, F1 and balanced accuracy.

name: copy-Model training
text: Formal image-only and multi-modal experiments completed; CSV metrics, predictions and figures generated.
textPreview: Formal image-only and multi-modal experiments completed; CSV metrics, predictions and figures generated.

name: copy-Backend
text: FastAPI loads the trained checkpoint, accepts image and metadata fields, returns top-k prediction and disclaimer.
textPreview: FastAPI loads the trained checkpoint, accepts image and metadata fields, returns top-k prediction and disclaimer.

name: copy-Mobile app
text: Flutter screens support login/session flow, lesion image input, clinical form, prediction display and history.
textPreview: Flutter screens support login/session flow, lesion image input, clinical form, prediction display and history.

title: Initial results: multi-modal model improves the baseline

name: slide-title
text: Initial results: multi-modal model improves the baseline
textPreview: Initial results: multi-modal model improves the baseline

name: copy-Main interpretation
text: Fusion improves every melanoma-focused comparison metric on the same 6,625-sample validation set.
textPreview: Fusion improves every melanoma-focused comparison metric on the same 6,625-sample validation set.

name: source-note
text: Source: metrics_summary.csv from formal baseline and multi-modal experiment folders.
textPreview: Source: metrics_summary.csv from formal baseline and multi-modal experiment folders.

title: Discussion of results and remaining limitations

name: slide-title
text: Discussion of results and remaining limitations
textPreview: Discussion of results and remaining limitations

name: copy-What improved
text: False positives reduced from 592 to 478; true positives increased from 60 to 63.
textPreview: False positives reduced from 592 to 478; true positives increased from 60 to 63.

name: copy-What still limits the model
text: The malignant class remains small, so precision and F1 are still low even when AUC and specificity improve.
textPreview: The malignant class remains small, so precision and F1 are still low even when AUC and specificity improve.

name: copy-Next technical step
text: Threshold analysis should guide the screening operating point instead of default argmax alone.
textPreview: Threshold analysis should guide the screening operating point instead of default argmax alone.

name: copy-App implication
text: The UI should show confidence as screening support with a visible medical limitation statement.
textPreview: The UI should show confidence as screening support with a visible medical limitation statement.

name: copy-Evaluation implication
text: Future testing should include more robustness checks and explicit subgroup analysis where data permits.
textPreview: Future testing should include more robustness checks and explicit subgroup analysis where data permits.

preview: Confusion matrix | TN | FP | FN | TP

name: copy-Plan refinements after review
text: Scope narrowed to a backend PyTorch deployment for mid-term stability; ONNX/local inference moved to future work; baseline comparison kept central.
textPreview: Scope narrowed to a backend PyTorch deployment for mid-term stability; ONNX/local inference moved to future work; baseline comparison kep...

name: copy-Main risks
text: Class imbalance, overfitting, preprocessing mismatch, missing metadata and user misunderstanding of medical output.
textPreview: Class imbalance, overfitting, preprocessing mismatch, missing metadata and user misunderstanding of medical output.

name: copy-Ethics controls
text: Use public research data only, store prototype history locally, avoid diagnostic claims and include a medical disclaimer.
textPreview: Use public research data only, store prototype history locally, avoid diagnostic claims and include a medical disclaimer.

name: source-note

textPreview: Source: Project log-book risk assessment, ethics assessment and management plan.

name: conclusion
text:
Mid-term conclusion
- The end-to-end prototype is substantially implemented.
- Multi-modal fusion improves key validation metrics over the image-only baseline.
- The remaining work is evaluation polish, app testing, report writing and deployment extension.
textPreview: Mid-term conclusion | - The end-to-end prototype is substantially implemented. | - Multi-modal fusion improves key validation metrics ove...
